name: MiniCalendar
description: Compact calendar to display a small number of days in a row
searchText: minicalendar compact calendar to display a small number of days in a row @mantine/dates /dates/mini-calendar date defaultdate getdayprops locale maxdate mindate monthlabelformat nextcontrolprops numberofdays onchange ondatechange onnext onprevious previouscontrolprops size value

props.name: date
props.description: Controlled component date value, start date of the interval

props.name: defaultDate
props.description: Uncontrolled component default value, start date of the interval

props.name: getDayProps
props.description: Props passed down to the day component

props.name: maxDate
props.description: Maximum date that can be selected, date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: minDate
props.description: Minimum date that can be selected, date object or date string in YYYY-MM-DD format

props.name: monthLabelFormat
props.description: Dayjs format string for month label

props.name: nextControlProps
props.description: Props passed to next control button

props.name: numberOfDays
props.description: Number of days to display in the calendar

props.name: onChange
props.description: Called with date in YYYY-MM-DD format when date changes

props.name: onDateChange
props.description: Called with date in YYYY-MM-DD format when date internal changes

props.name: onNext
props.description: Called when the next button is clicked

props.name: onPrevious
props.description: Called when the previous button is clicked

props.name: previousControlProps
props.description: Props passed to previous control button
